suggestedActivities.title: Chaweng Beach early morning run - hard sand near the water, 5-6km loop
Ang Thong island hike to viewpoint - steep 500m climb, incredible view
Koh Tao: hike to Mango Viewpoint - brutal climb, worth the sweat
Hin Lad Waterfall trail - 2km jungle trek each way, wear actual shoes
Lamai Beach early morning run - quieter than Chaweng
Chaweng Lake mangrove loop - flat 5km track, very popular with locals
Silver Beach headland trail - rock hopping to hidden coves
Sunrise run: Hin Ta & Hin Yai - coastal path before 7am - empty & cool breeze

legTips.text: Request early check-in at Homm
Book Ang Thong via Blue Star Sailing - smaller groups, better lunch
Na Muang 2: more dramatic than #1, wear grippy shoes for the hike
Elephant sanctuary: ~฿2,500pp including lunch
Friday Market: arrive 5pm to beat the crowd, incredible street food
Secret Garden: ~30min drive inland, rent a scooter - very steep road!
Silver Beach: calm clear water - best snorkelling right off the beach
Book Grab for 06:30 airport pickup tomorrow - morning traffic to USM
